payload.answer: SQL access is disabled in this environment, so the query was not executed.
citations: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
payload.decision: Denied because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false disables admin SQL access.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity to resolve from a denied SQL command.

payload.intent: Attempt to execute an admin SQL query against memory_cards.

details: Admin SQL blocked by configuration flag BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
No memory data was read or modified.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a trusted debug environment.
Use a supported non-SQL inspection or retrieval command instead.
If you only need diagnostics, provide the specific memory card or entity to inspect.
